ShortDescription.Value: AdvancedTPM - Advanced Tax and Production Manager

Publish.LongDescription:
Take Absolute Control of Your City's Economy
Advanced Tax and Production Manager (AdvancedTPM) is an all-in-one economic dashboard that gives you deep visibility into your supply chain and automates your tax rates without sacrificing a single frame.
## Tax and Production Dashboard - Per-resource tax sliders for 50+ resources across raw materials, industrial goods, immaterial services, commercial retail, and entertainment. - Real-time production and consumption bars with surplus and deficit indicators. - Resources organized by supply chain category (Agriculture, Forestry, Mining, Oil, Office, Entertainment, Commercial). - Per-resource and total tax income with in-game currency formatting. - Workforce stats and demand signals per resource.
## Company Browser - Sortable and filterable table. Browse all companies by zone, profitability tier, profit range, or text search. - Expand any company row to see brand name, building address, level, zone, output and input resources, staffing bars, and efficiency breakdown. - Efficiency factor analysis showing each factor (Electricity, Water, Garbage, Mail, Telecom, Staffing) with CS2 icons and percentage impact. - Click any company to jump the camera directly to its building. - Company happiness score visible in both rows and expanded detail panels. - Signature building detection. All known DLC signature buildings are flagged in the detail panel and used by the Advisor.
## Residential Browser - Filterable and sortable table for all residential zones. Columns for address, density, level, occupancy, theme, and custom content packs. - Automatically detects and groups buildings by creator pack with icon headers. - Dynamic pack summary dashboard counting buildings per installed content pack.
## Districts Dashboard - Reorderable district cards with settings, demographic metrics, and district-level policies. - Happiness aggregation integrated into the Districts panel.
## Services Browser - Filterable panel for tracking city service buildings with live metrics.
## Auto-Tax Engine - 6-factor scoring balancing profitability, happiness, production, demand, company count, and tax income. - Per-resource min and max rate ranges. Fine-tune allowed tax bounds for each resource. - Lock specific resources from auto-adjustment. - Adjustable speed to control how frequently the engine makes changes. - Profitability weight slider for finer control over the scoring formula.
## Adaptive Learning Advisor - Tracks sensitivity, income response, company response, production impact, revenue efficiency, and volatility per resource. - Records before and after snapshots when tax rates change and scores outcomes after an observation period. - Confidence-weighted recommendations. Higher confidence means stronger influence on scoring. - Decision log to browse recent advisor actions with outcome scores. - Profiles saved to disk and loaded between sessions.
## Performance Built specifically for the Cohtml engine using direct-DOM manipulation. The mod's UI thread cost is approximately 1.3ms. Economic data tracking runs with no measurable impact on game FPS.
Publish.ChangeLog:
## v1.1.4 - Signature Buildings, UI Fixes, and Stability
### Added - Signature tab icon rendering is now fixed. Full DLC building whitelist is complete. - ThemeIcon support added to Residential filter dropdowns. - New CustomSelect component replaces native dropdowns panel-wide to fix viewport clipping. - Profitability weight slider added to the Auto-Tax settings panel.
### Fixed - Removed blank icon stubs for user-created mods. - Fixed UI clipping in panel dropdowns. - Resolved C# compilation errors in school, hospital, and garbage data extraction. - Eliminated spammy heartbeat logs that were causing soft-crashes. - Fixed Residential summary table header showing plain text instead of pack icons. - Fixed window dragging occasionally getting stuck after release. - Improved Auto-Tax locale strings and enabled-count label spacing.
## v1.1.3 - Residential Browser and Custom Asset Tracking
### Added - Residential Browser: Filterable and sortable panel for all residential zones. - Custom asset pack detection and grouping with PackIcon headers. - District-level demographics and household stats.
### Fixed - Base Game icon now shows the correct Paradox Star icon for vanilla assets. - Theme names for custom assets are preserved as authored. - Zero-allocation buffer optimization for building data parsing.
